basics.name: Remar Delatina
basics.label: Software Engineer | JS Enthusiast
basics.summary: Specializes in JavaScript, PHP, and Dart to deliver scalable and high-performance applications. From frontend to backend, I focus on optimizing user experience and performance while leveraging latest technologies.

education.area: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

certificates.name: Certificate of Eligibility
certificates.issuer: Civil Service Commission of the Philippines

work.name: Shopping Center Management Corporation
work.summary: Developed and maintained high-performance cross-platform mobile application using Flutter/Dart
responsibilities: Develops apps for SM Supermalls - Digital Commerce Division's software products and initiatives
Works with team members in building stong and scaleable software capabilities
Performs unit and functionality testing of product team's work
Collaborates, works efficiently and geek-play with the team
Works with the UX Designer to build the best experience

work.name: Department of Interior and Local Government
work.summary: Developed and deployed multiple full-stack web application projects using PHP utilizing Yii 2 framework
responsibilities: Perform System Analysis and Design and generate all the required system documentations in accordance with the department's ISO standards
Develop the Database Design and Structure using MySQL
Carry out a sequence of application tests and resolve any encountered bugs or issues during the testing process

projects.name: SM Malls Online
projects.description: A high-performance, cross-platform mobile application developed using Flutter and Dart, following Clean Architecture principles to ensure code scalability, modularity, and maintainability across Android and iOS platforms
highlights: Utilized Bloc and Riverpod for robust state management, enabling reactive UI updates and simplified business logic handling
Enhanced user engagement and retention by implementing MoEngage for personalized notifications and AppsFlyer for user attribution and in-app behavior analytics
Published and managed app releases through Google Play Store and Apple App Store, coordinating build/version control using Git and GitHub workflows

projects.name: Asset Management System
projects.description: A web-based application built with PHP/Yii2 that manages the tracking of equipment, items, and inventory across the procurement, issuance, and monitoring processes of daily business operations
highlights: Designed to support operational efficiency in inventory management
Enables end-to-end item and stock tracking from procurement to issuance
Supported accountability by maintaining a detailed audit trail of item movements and usage history

projects.name: DILG Messenger
projects.description: A web-based internal messaging system built with Node.js/Socket.IO and PHP/Yii2, designed to mimic Facebook Messenger functionality for government office communication
highlights: Provided an internal alternative to third-party messaging apps, improving data control and privacy
Ensured secure communication with user authentication and encrypted data transmission
Integrated notification systems and chat history retrieval for better user experience

projects.name: LGU Development Planning Profile
projects.description: A planning and profiling tool for Local Government Units (LGUs) to encode and manage their Annual Investment Plan and Local Development Investment Program
highlights: Led the development of a structured input system for capturing investment plans and funding allocations
Enabled LGUs to digitally manage long-term development plans with consistent data formats
Included features for plan versioning, validation, and submission workflows

projects.name: Local Governance Performance Management System
projects.description: An online national information system that captures and presents data on local government performance to aid in local and national policy-making
highlights: Contributed to the design of performance indicators and data capture modules tailored to LGU operations
Developed backend services to process and validate large volumes of governance performance data
Created data dashboards to visualize KPIs across regions, allowing performance benchmarking
